mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_share_link_message ( id, link_id, message_id, create_time, com_acct_id ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{linkId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{comAcctId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.select: SELECT message_id FROM message_share_link_message WHERE link_id = #{linkId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message_share_link_message ( id, link_id, message_id, create_time, com_acct_id ) VALUES
( #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{record.linkId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{record.messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{record.comAcctId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
